name: The Weeknd
bio: The Weeknd has built one of modern pop's most valuable catalogs through global streaming, hit density, and crossover brand power.
notable_for: Dark pop aesthetics, massive streaming scale, and international hit consistency.
career_highlight: His catalog operates at global playlist scale, with songs that remain dominant long after release.
revenue_drivers: Billions of annual streams drive premium recurring income.
Global playlists keep catalog tracks visible across markets.
Brand partnerships and sync opportunities amplify music earnings.
